title: [Deprecated] Curios Compat Layer for Accessories
description: A Compatibility layer for mods using the Curios API to work with Accessories
body:
# Deprecation Notice

For versions **1.21.1 and up**, this is being replaced with the new [**Accessories Compat Layer**](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-compat-layer), with exactly the same function besides **needing to install** Curios alongside the new mod! 

# Accessories Curios Compatibility Layer

Such mod acts as a compatibility layer for mods using the [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) to work within the [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/project/accessories) Ecosystem.

**DO NOT INSTALL CURIOS, THIS ACTS AS IF CURIOS AS ITS A WRAPPER FOR ITS API.**

Any existing Curios data should be transferred into accessory inventory or ejected within the inventory if a problem occurs.
